Primary.$description: Page canvas - the default app surface.

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover on the page canvas (rows, list items).

Secondary.$description: First raised surface - cards and panels.

Tertiary.$description: Second surface level - wells, table stripes, insets.

Primary.$description: Solid neutral fill - secondary buttons, chips, toggle-off.

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover of the solid neutral fill.

Secondary.$description: Light neutral fill - subtle chips, pills, table headers.

Secondary-Hover.$description: Hover of the light neutral fill.

Tertiary.$description: Faintest neutral fill - quiet backgrounds.

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the faint neutral fill.

Primary.$description: Violet brand fill - primary actions and strong emphasis.

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover of the violet brand fill (one step away from its text colour).

Secondary.$description: Violet tint - selected states, secondary emphasis.

Tertiary.$description: Faintest violet tint - soft backgrounds, highlights.

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the faint violet tint.

Primary.$description: Magenta brand fill - primary actions and strong emphasis.

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover of the magenta brand fill (one step away from its text colour).

Secondary.$description: Magenta tint - selected states, secondary emphasis.

Tertiary.$description: Faintest magenta tint - soft backgrounds, highlights.

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the faint magenta tint.

Primary.$description: Coral brand fill - primary actions and strong emphasis.

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover of the coral brand fill (one step away from its text colour).

Secondary.$description: Coral tint - selected states, secondary emphasis.

Tertiary.$description: Faintest coral tint - soft backgrounds, highlights.

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the faint coral tint.

Primary.$description: Green brand fill - primary actions and strong emphasis.

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover of the green brand fill (one step away from its text colour).

Secondary.$description: Green tint - selected states, secondary emphasis.

Tertiary.$description: Faintest green tint - soft backgrounds, highlights.

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the faint green tint.

Primary.$description: Orange brand fill - primary actions and strong emphasis.

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover of the orange brand fill (one step away from its text colour).

Secondary.$description: Orange tint - selected states, secondary emphasis.

Tertiary.$description: Faintest orange tint - soft backgrounds, highlights.

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the faint orange tint.

Primary.$description: Blue brand fill - primary actions and strong emphasis.

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover of the blue brand fill (one step away from its text colour).

Secondary.$description: Blue tint - selected states, secondary emphasis.

Tertiary.$description: Faintest blue tint - soft backgrounds, highlights.

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the faint blue tint.

Bold.$description: Solid success fill - positive results, confirmations. Banners, badges, toasts.

Light.$description: Success tint - soft banners, row highlights.

Bold-Hover.$description: Hover for bold success fills — follows the hover law.

Light-Hover.$description: Hover for light success tints (one step darker).

Bold.$description: Solid warning fill - caution, attention needed. Banners, badges, toasts.

Light.$description: Warning tint - soft banners, row highlights.

Bold-Hover.$description: Hover for bold warning fills — follows the hover law.

Light-Hover.$description: Hover for light warning tints (one step darker).

Bold.$description: Solid danger fill - errors, destructive actions. Banners, badges, toasts.

Light.$description: Danger tint - soft banners, row highlights.

Bold-Hover.$description: Hover for bold danger fills — follows the hover law.

Light-Hover.$description: Hover for light danger tints (one step darker).

Primary.$description: Fill for disabled controls.

Bold.$description: Solid info fill - neutral information. Banners, badges, toasts.

Light.$description: Info tint - soft banners, row highlights.

Bold-Hover.$description: Hover for bold info fills — follows the hover law.

Light-Hover.$description: Hover for light info tints (one step darker).

Inverse.$description: Light overlay on dark imagery/video; inverse of Overlay/Default.

Default.$description: Blocking layer under modals; also darkens photos for text (black 70%).
Frosted translucent surface (bars, menus over scroll) - pair with Blur/400 background blur.

Inverse.$description: Dark glass plate over media - player controls, badges on imagery; pair with Blur/* when frosted.

Default.$description: Selected item background - active menu row, chosen date, highlighted table row.

Primary.$description: Yellow brand fill - primary actions and strong emphasis.

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover of the yellow brand fill (one step away from its text colour).

Secondary.$description: Yellow tint - selected states, secondary emphasis.

Tertiary.$description: Faintest yellow tint - soft backgrounds, highlights.

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the faint yellow tint.

Primary.$description: Main text on light surfaces.

Secondary.$description: Muted text - captions, meta, labels.

Tertiary.$description: Faintest text - hints, placeholders.

Primary.$description: Text on solid neutral fills (white).
Violet accent text on light surfaces.

On-Primary.$description: White — violet/500 is dark enough for white (AA). Light-main hues use hue/900.

On-Tertiary.$description: Text on the faint violet tint.

Primary.$description: Magenta accent text on light surfaces.

On-Primary.$description: magenta/900 — the main /500 is light, white would fail contrast. Violet/blue use white.

On-Tertiary.$description: Text on the faint magenta tint.

Primary.$description: Coral accent text on light surfaces.

On-Primary.$description: coral/900 — the main /500 is light, white would fail contrast. Violet/blue use white.

On-Tertiary.$description: Text on the faint coral tint.

Primary.$description: Bright accent (/700) — 3:1 large text only, not small body.

On-Primary.$description: green/900 — the main /500 is light, white would fail contrast. Violet/blue use white.

On-Tertiary.$description: Text on the faint green tint.

Primary.$description: Orange accent text on light surfaces.

On-Primary.$description: orange/900 — the main /500 is light, white would fail contrast. Violet/blue use white.

On-Tertiary.$description: Text on the faint orange tint.

Primary.$description: Blue accent text on light surfaces.

On-Primary.$description: White — blue/500 is dark enough for white (AA). Light-main hues use hue/900.

On-Tertiary.$description: Text on the faint blue tint.

On-Bold.$description: Hue/900 - this status bold is light, white would fail contrast (white-text-hues rule).

On-Light.$description: Success text on its Light tint.

On-Bold.$description: Hue/900 - this status bold is light, white would fail contrast (white-text-hues rule).

On-Light.$description: Warning text on its Light tint.

On-Bold.$description: Hue/900 - this status bold is light, white would fail contrast (white-text-hues rule).

On-Light.$description: Danger text on its Light tint.

Primary.$description: Disabled text — WCAG exempts inactive components from contrast minimums.

On-Bold.$description: White - info bold (blue) is dark enough for white. Same white-text rule as brand colours.

On-Light.$description: Info text on its Light tint.

Primary.$description: Bright accent (/700) — 3:1 large text only, not small body.

On-Primary.$description: yellow/900 — the main /500 is light, white would fail contrast. Violet/blue use white.

On-Tertiary.$description: Text on the faint yellow tint.

Primary.$description: Main icons on light surfaces.

Secondary.$description: Muted icons - captions, meta, labels.

Tertiary.$description: Faintest icons - hints, placeholders.

Primary.$description: Icons on solid neutral fills (white).
Violet accent icons on light surfaces.

On-Primary.$description: White — violet/500 is dark enough for white (AA). Light-main hues use hue/900.

On-Tertiary.$description: Icons on the faint violet tint.

Primary.$description: Magenta accent icons on light surfaces.

On-Primary.$description: magenta/900 — the main /500 is light, white would fail contrast. Violet/blue use white.

On-Tertiary.$description: Icons on the faint magenta tint.

Primary.$description: Coral accent icons on light surfaces.

On-Primary.$description: coral/900 — the main /500 is light, white would fail contrast. Violet/blue use white.

On-Tertiary.$description: Icons on the faint coral tint.

Primary.$description: Green accent icons on light surfaces.

On-Primary.$description: green/900 — the main /500 is light, white would fail contrast. Violet/blue use white.

On-Tertiary.$description: Icons on the faint green tint.

Primary.$description: Orange accent icons on light surfaces.

On-Primary.$description: orange/900 — the main /500 is light, white would fail contrast. Violet/blue use white.

On-Tertiary.$description: Icons on the faint orange tint.

Primary.$description: Blue accent icons on light surfaces.

On-Primary.$description: White — blue/500 is dark enough for white (AA). Light-main hues use hue/900.

On-Tertiary.$description: Icons on the faint blue tint.

On-Bold.$description: Hue/900 - this status bold is light, white would fail contrast (white-text-hues rule).

On-Light.$description: Success icons on its Light tint.

On-Bold.$description: Hue/900 - this status bold is light, white would fail contrast (white-text-hues rule).

On-Light.$description: Warning icons on its Light tint.

On-Bold.$description: Hue/900 - this status bold is light, white would fail contrast (white-text-hues rule).

On-Light.$description: Danger icons on its Light tint.

Primary.$description: Disabled icons - WCAG-exempt.

On-Bold.$description: White - info bold (blue) is dark enough for white. Same white-text rule as brand colours.

On-Light.$description: Info icons on its Light tint.

Primary.$description: Yellow accent icons on light surfaces.

On-Primary.$description: yellow/900 — the main /500 is light, white would fail contrast. Violet/blue use white.

On-Tertiary.$description: Icons on the faint yellow tint.

Primary.$description: Quiet hairline - dividers, quiet cards. Decorative (exempt from 3:1).

Secondary.$description: Functional border - inputs, selects. Meets 3:1 on light surfaces. Hover state: step up to Tertiary.

Tertiary.$description: Strong border - input hover/active, emphasised frames.

Default.$description: Keyboard focus ring on light surfaces.

On-Fill.$description: Focus ring sitting on bright/brand fills.

Primary.$description: Readable violet border - meets 3:1 on light surfaces.

Secondary.$description: Decorative violet border (= main /500), exempt from 3:1 - pair with a fill/tint.

Tertiary.$description: Soft violet frame - on tinted cards and surfaces.

Primary.$description: Readable magenta border - meets 3:1 on light surfaces.

Secondary.$description: Decorative magenta border (= main /500), exempt from 3:1 - pair with a fill/tint.

Tertiary.$description: Soft magenta frame - on tinted cards and surfaces.

Primary.$description: Readable coral border - meets 3:1 on light surfaces.

Secondary.$description: Decorative coral border (= main /500), exempt from 3:1 - pair with a fill/tint.

Tertiary.$description: Soft coral frame - on tinted cards and surfaces.

Primary.$description: Readable green border - meets 3:1 on light surfaces.

Secondary.$description: Decorative green border (= main /500), exempt from 3:1 - pair with a fill/tint.

Tertiary.$description: Soft green frame - on tinted cards and surfaces.

Primary.$description: Readable orange border - meets 3:1 on light surfaces.

Secondary.$description: Decorative orange border (= main /500), exempt from 3:1 - pair with a fill/tint.

Tertiary.$description: Soft orange frame - on tinted cards and surfaces.

Primary.$description: Readable blue border - meets 3:1 on light surfaces.

Secondary.$description: Decorative blue border (= main /500), exempt from 3:1 - pair with a fill/tint.

Tertiary.$description: Soft blue frame - on tinted cards and surfaces.

Primary.$description: Functional success border - keeps 3:1 on light surfaces.

Secondary.$description: Decorative success border (main hue) - pair with a fill.

Tertiary.$description: Soft success frame on its Light tint.

Primary.$description: Functional warning border - keeps 3:1 on light surfaces.

Secondary.$description: Decorative warning border (main hue) - pair with a fill.

Tertiary.$description: Soft warning frame on its Light tint.

Primary.$description: Functional danger border - keeps 3:1 on light surfaces.

Secondary.$description: Decorative danger border (main hue) - pair with a fill.

Tertiary.$description: Soft danger frame on its Light tint.

Primary.$description: Functional info border - keeps 3:1 on light surfaces.

Secondary.$description: Decorative info border (main hue) - pair with a fill.

Tertiary.$description: Soft info frame on its Light tint.

Primary.$description: Readable yellow border - meets 3:1 on light surfaces.

Secondary.$description: Decorative yellow border (= main /500), exempt from 3:1 - pair with a fill/tint.

Tertiary.$description: Soft yellow frame - on tinted cards and surfaces.

Swatch.$description: Hairline for colour swatches/thumbnails so light fills keep an edge.

1.$description: Categorical chart palette: assign by series order (1..8), never by meaning. Statuses cover semantic colour.

2.$description: Categorical chart palette: assign by series order (1..8), never by meaning. Statuses cover semantic colour.

3.$description: Categorical chart palette: assign by series order (1..8), never by meaning. Statuses cover semantic colour.

4.$description: Categorical chart palette: assign by series order (1..8), never by meaning. Statuses cover semantic colour.

5.$description: Categorical chart palette: assign by series order (1..8), never by meaning. Statuses cover semantic colour.

6.$description: Categorical chart palette: assign by series order (1..8), never by meaning. Statuses cover semantic colour.

7.$description: Categorical chart palette: assign by series order (1..8), never by meaning. Statuses cover semantic colour.

8.$description: Categorical chart palette: assign by series order (1..8), never by meaning. Statuses cover semantic colour.

Border.$description: Default hairline for inputs, cards, dividers (1px).

Ring.$description: Width of the focus ring itself (CSS outline-width).

Offset.$description: GAP between element edge and focus ring (CSS outline-offset) — spacing, not a stroke. Not applicable inside Figma.

Overlay.$description: Backdrop blur for overlays - pair with Background/Overlay/*.

Scrim.$description: Backdrop blur for scrims behind modals.

Heavy.$description: Heaviest backdrop blur - hero media, Background/Frosted/Inverse.

Disabled.$description: Layer opacity for disabled elements - percent (Figma binds it as 40%); code gets 0.4.

Muted.$description: Layer opacity for de-emphasised elements - percent (60%); code gets 0.6.
